visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man in a dark suit and white collared shirt. He has short, dark hair and a serious, intense expression. He is pointing a black handgun directly forward, his hands steady. In the blurred foreground, the hand of another person is visible, with what appears to be bloodstains on the sleeve. The background is an out-of-focus urban environment, suggesting a street or alley. In the top left corner of the screen, there are two Chinese characters, "风行网". The camera remains static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's determined face and the gun. The audio consists solely of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played on a string instrument, creates a serious and contemplative atmosphere. The music is quiet and atmospheric, building a sense of tension and gravity without any dialogue or sound effects. The overall mood is one of quiet intensity and somber reflection.
